examples: Crowds of onlookers came to gawp at the wreckage of the aircraft.
They also take willing subjects and observe their reactions as they gawp at products.
We're allowed to gawp at perfection, marvel at beauty, openly wish we could prod chests and have a go on triceps - it's the Olympic Gaze.
You may gawp or flinch, but your pulse, like that of Dr. Lecter himself, will stay disappointingly slow.
We gawp and we salivate, but then we return to our sadly untelegenic kitchens and fry another egg.
